UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores user-specific data required for lunar calculations and app personalization.

birthDate.description: The user's birth date in YYYY-MM-DD format, used to calculate lunar age.

StickyNote.title: StickyNote
StickyNote.description: Stores a user's single, persistent sticky note.

content.description: The main text content of the sticky note.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores individual user profiles. The document ID (`{userId}`) matches the Firebase Authentication UID.

/users/{userId}/sticky_notes/{noteId}.description: A subcollection for a user's notes. For now, we only use a single document with the ID 'main'.
